description: Routine vision-pending-card-to-existing-node attachment. The team-rocket node body had already pre-named this card as the vision-pending Team-Rocket-affiliated extension (Destined Rivals 2025 returning-villain mechanic with the `Team Rocket's` named-prefix); wave 24 vision pass landed it cleanly with the canonical R-emblem-on-cartoon-bomb iconography rendered as faction-iconography-as-object (no figures, just the weapon as graphic identity). Frontmatter `characters: [team-rocket]` pointer wired + node `appears_on:` extended + node body's pending-vision bullet promoted into enriched-corpus bullet. Corpus stack thickens from 1 to 2 enriched. Blueballed-by-fanout: 1:N from the faction node, no card-to-card mirror, but the fan is justified because it's a faction-iconography card not a character-portrait card.
citations: [PokemonTCG.io: sv10-179 — Team Rocket's Venture Bomb Item card, Toyste Beach art, Destined Rivals 2025]
[Bulbapedia: Destined Rivals (TCG) — returning-villain mechanic, Team Rocket's-prefix card cohort]
[Wave 24 vision pass: canonical R-emblem on black bomb badge, lit fuse glowing flame, plain background]
files_modified: cards/_characters/team-rocket.md (appears_on extended + Cards-pending-vision bullet promoted to Cards-in-corpus enriched bullet)
